title: Popowia aberrans
intro: Popowia aberrans is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the aberrant Popowia tree. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Popowia aberrans include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal activities. In traditional medicine, Popowia aberrans is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in the production of topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
